name: DEMO — Audit-assistent (generic)
purpose: Generic example of an AI audit-assistant configuration. Supports an auditor in evidence gathering, framework mapping, and report drafting. Works on internal audit-dossiers; generates draft conclusions for human review. No PII beyond standard audit-team identifiers.

G.01.note: AI policy ratified by management board.

I.01.note: SSO + hardware MFA enforced on AI vendor account.

I.04.note: Rate-limit + spend cap configured at provider console.

T.01.note: AI-generated output is clearly labeled in all exports.

T.03.note: Output includes reasoning and source citations.

A.01.note: Append-only prompt/response log not yet implemented.

A.02.note: Prompt / skill changes not yet tracked in version control.

I.02.note: Relying on model's built-in defense; no external input scan yet.

I.03.note: No programmatic DLP on model output.

D.03.note: PII-redaction is manual before prompt submission.

D.04.note: Model provider hosts in US; accepted risk for non-special-category data.

history.note: Demo configuration created for SAAF contribution.
